title: The Traveler's Adventure
body:
![A banner with the text "TRAVELERS ADVENTURE" and three minecraft skins standing. With the image background being a sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e77efc3e46ce255471e070d399bcbd9cdfe0732a.png)

# THE TRAVELER'S ADVENTURE
Greetings adventurers and welcome to this exciting modpack with the theme of exploration! This modpack features mods that improves exploration in the game in both the overworld, nether, end and other special dimensions. These mods makes the terrain look awesome, makes structures more interesting and add new bosses and items for you to have fun with.

## ⚔️ Dimensions and items
This modpack has two mods that improve the nether and the end ([BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)). Both of these mods add new weapons, tools, armor and more to these classic dimensions. There are also new dimensions that aren't in the normal game, one of which is Deeper And Darker, an eerie place filled with sculk, where you also get get the Warden tools and armor and a few new building blocks.

## 🏠 Building and structures
One of the most important mods in this modpack is [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit). This mod improves the terrain and adds new biomes, with new blocks that can be used to decorate and build anything you can imagine. There are also new structures to explore. One of the mods adds improved cities and new exciting towers to discover.

## ✨ General improvements
In order to provide the best experience for this modpack, optimization mods, some quality of life mods and other mods for a better overall experience have been installed. These mods range from new ambient sounds to a zoom feature to better looking fog. One of the optimization mods is [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) which drastically increases performance and allows you to have more chunks (Nvidium requires a Nvidia graphics card with mesh shaders support)

## 🔮 Extras
This modpack is currently not fully developed. There may be bugs and things that are described here may not be implemented yet. If you have any problems with the pack, please contact @quelxy on discord.
